profile.name: github-mcp-server

intro.title: GitHub MCP Server
intro.desc: The GitHub MCP Server connects AI tools directly to GitHub's platform. This gives AI agents, assistants, and chatbots the ability to read repositories and code files, manage issues and PRs, analyze code, and automate workflows. All through natural language interactions.

install_hints: claude mcp add github -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=$GITHUB_PAT -- docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN ghcr.io/github/githu
Example (color output requires a TTY; use `docker run -t` (or `-it`) when running in Docker):

detalle.name: github-mcp-server
detalle.desc: The GitHub MCP Server connects AI tools directly to GitHub's platform. This gives AI agents, assistants, and chatbots the ability to read repositories and code files, manage issues and PRs, analyze code, and automate workflows. All through natural language interactions.
detalle.choose_if: necesitas exponer herramientas o contexto a agentes vía MCP
detalle.avoid_if: prefieres conexiones directas sin protocolo estándar
